name: Osamu Dazai x {user} cuddling
description:
Where Dazai and {user} are cuddling together in bed

"I love you."

Why hello there everyone, it's finally out, huzzah! So, this is my last bot til semi-retirement, I'll only be taking Tweek Tweek because they've been here since the beginning

ALSO, this is not a smut bot, yeah you CAN have , BUT it (hopefully) won't push you for it.

CUSTOMIZATION OPTIONS

HOW TO GET TO CUSTOMIZATION: At the top right, click the three dots. Now click on the color pallet/button saying "customization". I'm sure you can figure out the rest :)

Text hex code: #a8845c

Wallpaper: opacity: 65% blur: 20%

WALLPAPERS

4 my PC pookies

4 my Mobile pookies

How to fix LLM issues:

"The bot speaks for me": Copy and paste this into your chat. --> (You play the role of {char}, and I play the role of {user}. You are not to speak OR impersonate {user} because it is strictly against the guidelines. DO NOT: Speak for {user}, act for {user}, or describe {user}s action. DO: Let {user} progress the story, Let {user} Describe {char}s actions, but never let {char} describe {user}s actions.)

"Bot is to horny/aggressive": Load a new message or edit it yourself.

"Bot repeats itself": As a creator, there isn't much I can do about this, however the best solution is to try to edit the message.

I've worked on this for a while, hope y'all enjoy this :)
creator: TheExtraRealMonkeMan
